title: HBCHRC Muzaffarpur Purchase Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
org: Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital & Research Center Muzaffarpur
shortInfo: Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital & Research Center Muzaffarpur (HBCHRC Muzaffarpur) Purchase Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 19 May 2026 on the official website of HBCHRC Muzaffarpur. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the HBCHRC Muzaffarpur Purchase Officer Recruitment 2026.

basic_details.job_title: HBCHRC Muzaffarpur Purchase Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital & Research Center Muzaffarpur
basic_details.short_information: Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital & Research Center Muzaffarpur (HBCHRC Muzaffarpur) Purchase Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 19 May 2026 on the official website of HBCHRC Muzaffarpur. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the HBCHRC Muzaffarpur Purchase Officer Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years. Deserving and bright candidates may be given age relaxation.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation, Proficiency in computer applications and knowledge in respective subject
qualification.details: Graduation with 15 years work experience in Central/State Government/PSU/Autonomous Bodies in Purchase and Stores (5 years in supervisory role). Proficiency in computer applications and knowledge of Government rules & regulations is desirable.

salary_details.details: Rs. 60,000/- Per Month (Higher remuneration may be offered to deserving candidates).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for HBCHRC Muzaffarpur Purchase Officer Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 28-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the HBCHRC Muzaffarpur Purchase Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Purchase Officer post is 28th May 2026. It is advisable to send your application well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the age limit for the Purchase Officer position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Purchase Officer position is 45 years. However, age relaxation may be provided to deserving and bright candidates.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Purchase Officer role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Purchase Officer position will receive a salary of Rs. 60,000/- per month. Higher remuneration might be offered to exceptionally deserving candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the HBCHRC Muzaffarpur Purchase Officer recruitment involves a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What are the essential qualifications required for the Purchase Officer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Graduation degree along with 15 years of work experience in Purchase and Stores within Central/State Government, PSU, or Autonomous Bodies, with at least 5 years in a supervisory role.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies announced?
faq.answer: Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital & Research Center Muzaffarpur has announced a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Purchase Officer.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application for the Purchase Officer position at HBCHRC Muzaffarpur is to be submitted via email.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital & Research Center Muzaffarpur, located in Muzaffarpur, Bihar (Pincode: 842004).

faq.question: Q10. Does the notification mention any preference for computer skills?
faq.answer: Yes, proficiency in computer applications and knowledge of Government rules & regulations are considered desirable for the Purchase Officer position.
